overview: This roadmap provides a comprehensive, structured path to mastering Data Structures and Algorithms, starting from fundamental linear structures, advancing through trees and graphs, and culminating in advanced dynamic programming and optimization algorithms.

milestones.title: Foundations & Linear Data Structures
topics: Time and Space Complexity (Big O Notation)
Basic Searching and Sorting (Binary Search, Bubble/Merge Sort)
practical_exercises: Implement a custom ArrayList and LinkedList from scratch
Create a Browser History Navigation system using Stacks

milestones.title: Non-Linear Data Structures & Classic Algorithms
topics: Binary Trees and Binary Search Trees (BST)
practical_exercises: Build a File System Directory Tree Explorer
Implement a Maze Solver using Backtracking and Depth-First Search
recommended_resources: LeetCode - Explore Card: Binary Tree and Graph

milestones.title: Advanced Algorithms & Optimization Techniques
practical_exercises: Develop a GPS Navigation Shortest Path Finder using Dijkstra's algorithm
Build a Search Engine Autocomplete system using a Trie data structure
recommended_resources: 'The Algorithm Design Manual' by Steven Skiena

overview: A comprehensive journey guiding absolute beginners to advanced Python developers, focusing on core syntax, object-oriented concepts, and professional software engineering practices.

milestones.title: Beginner Foundations
topics: Basic Data Structures (Lists, Dictionaries, Tuples, Sets)
recommended_resources: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python by Al Sweigart

milestones.title: Intermediate Concepts & OOP
topics: Working with Modules, Packages, and virtualenv
practical_exercises: Personal Expense Tracker with CSV/JSON Storage
CLI Weather App using requests to fetch API data
recommended_resources: Python Crash Course by Eric Matthes

milestones.title: Advanced Mastery & Engineering
practical_exercises: Asynchronous Web Scraper with Database Storage
RESTful API built with FastAPI or Flask
recommended_resources: Official Python Documentation (Advanced Guides and PEPs)
